3208690.name: Divinity Chess
3208690.description:
The Ultimate Chess Experience. Master the board, conquer the mind!

Divinity Chess stands at the forefront of chess interfaces, offering an immersive 3D experience and full integration with powerful analytic engines like Stockfish. With a vast database of grandmaster games, players can explore the depths of chess history to hone their skills.

Playback approximately 1,000,000 Grandmaster Games, move by move! Grandmasters include:

- Garry Kasparov

- Hikaru Nakamura

- Magnus Carlsen

- Viswanathan Anand

and of course many, many more!!!

Key Features:

- Immersive 3D experience with Divinity Chess interface

- Play against the number one rated game engine in the World known as Stockfish.

- Extensive database of grandmaster games for in-depth study

- Lichess connectivity - Download and playback the latest games! (Based on availability)

- Seamless saving, loading, and sharing of games

- Playback feature for thorough analysis of games
3208690.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
